# CWE-309 — Use of Password System for Primary Authentication (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-309-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: enterprise SSO route still accepts password form login only.
func EnterpriseLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	user := r.FormValue("username")
	pass := r.FormValue("password")
	if user == "" || pass == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing fields", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"session":"` + user + `"}`))
}
